HOME.WHY_SUB: We blend data-driven insights with personalized service to elevate your real estate experience.
HOME.WHY_1_DESC: Access exclusive and off-market properties that have been rigorously vetted to meet our uncompromising standards.
HOME.WHY_2_DESC: Make informed decisions backed by proprietary market data, predictive analytics, and expert valuation models.
HOME.WHY_3_DESC: Experience tailored guidance from elite agents dedicated to aligning your real estate goals with your life vision.

FOOTER.DESC: AI-powered real estate platform. Find your perfect home with smart search, recommendations, and a seamless booking experience.

NOTIFICATIONS.TITLE: Notification Center
NOTIFICATIONS.SUBTITLE: Stay updated with your latest property interactions and alerts.
NOTIFICATIONS.EMPTY_MSG: You're all caught up! New notifications will show up here as soon as they arrive.
NOTIFICATIONS.PUSH_BANNER_DESC: Get urgent alerts for messages and bookings directly on your device, even when the site is closed.
NOTIFICATIONS.PUSH_NOT_SUPPORTED: Your browser does not support push notifications.
NOTIFICATIONS.PUSH_SUCCESS_BODY: You will now receive urgent alerts and messages first-hand, even when the site is closed.
NOTIFICATIONS.PUSH_SUCCESS_BODY_FALLBACK: You will now receive urgent alerts and messages first-hand.
NOTIFICATIONS.GUIDE_INTRO: Baytology sends you 8 types of notifications. Each one helps you stay on top of conversations, bookings, and payments. Here is what they mean and how to benefit from them:

NewMessage.title: New chat message
NewMessage.when: Someone sends you a message in chat
NewMessage.explainer: This notification appears when a buyer or agent sends you a message in the chat. You can open the conversation and reply instantly without opening the full site. All conversations are saved in your account and you can revisit them at any time.

BookingConfirmed.title: Booking confirmed (auto)
BookingConfirmed.when: You paid and the system confirmed the booking
BookingConfirmed.explainer: This appears automatically the moment the bank or Paymob confirms the payment reached us. Without doing anything, your booking moves from awaiting payment to confirmed and the countdown to your viewing starts. This notification comes instantly from our secure payment system so you know the operation was successful.

PaymentCompleted.title: Payment received (agent)
PaymentCompleted.when: A buyer paid for one of your properties
PaymentCompleted.explainer: When any buyer pays for a booking on one of your properties, you receive this notification in the same moment. From the dashboard you can open the booking details, see the buyer information, and reach out to schedule the viewing. The property status also updates automatically (for example, from available to reserved).

PaymentFailed.title: Payment failed
PaymentFailed.when: Your card was declined or the bank rejected the payment
PaymentFailed.explainer: This appears if the card was declined, your balance was insufficient, or there was a connection issue with the bank. No money was charged from you - the operation fails before the actual charge. Tap the notification to return to the payment page and try again with a different card. If the problem persists, contact your card bank.

BookingConfirmedManual.title: Booking confirmed (by agent)
BookingConfirmedManual.when: The agent approved your booking after payment
BookingConfirmedManual.explainer: This appears when the agent is the one who approves the booking after payment. This happens in special cases when the agent needs to review the request before confirming. The agent approves it from their account and you automatically receive this notification. Without doing anything, you can wait for the appointment details.

BookingCancelledByAgent.title: Booking cancelled by agent
BookingCancelledByAgent.explainer: This appears when the agent decides to cancel the booking. The reasons could be: the property was booked by someone else, there is an issue with the data, or for any other reason. Tap the notification to see the cancellation details, or you can search for alternative properties in the same area in one click.

BookingCancelledByBuyer.title: Booking cancelled by buyer
BookingCancelledByBuyer.when: The buyer cancelled the booking (agent view)
BookingCancelledByBuyer.explainer: This appears instantly when the buyer cancels the booking. Good news: the property status updates automatically from reserved back to available, so if other people are asking, they will see the property is free. You do not need to do anything - the system adjusts everything on its own.

NewBookingRequest.title: New booking request
NewBookingRequest.when: A buyer booked one of your properties and is paying
NewBookingRequest.explainer: When any buyer chooses a viewing time and pays the deposit, you receive this notification instantly. It means: someone serious is actually interested in the property. The property switches to tentatively reserved until the payment is confirmed. From here you can open the dashboard, see the buyer details, and start communicating with them.

RefundApproved.title: Refund approved
RefundApproved.when: The admin approved your refund request
RefundApproved.explainer: When the Baytology admin team reviews your refund request and approves it, this notification reaches you instantly. The money returns to the same original payment method within 5-10 business days depending on the bank. This notification is the official proof of approval - keep it.

RefundRejected.title: Refund rejected
RefundRejected.when: The admin rejected your refund request
RefundRejected.explainer: When the Baytology admin team reviews your refund request and decides it does not meet the conditions. The details of the reason will follow on the details page. You can contact customer support from the same page if you feel there is a mistake, or read our terms to understand which cases are accepted.

PRIVACY.INTRO_TEXT: At Baytology, we prioritize your data privacy. This policy outlines how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when using our AI-powered platform.
PRIVACY.DATA_ACCOUNT_TEXT: Name, email, phone number, and profile picture, all stored securely.
PRIVACY.DATA_INTERACTION_TEXT: Search history, favorite properties, and preferences used by AI to improve recommendations.
PRIVACY.USAGE_ITEM1: Personalizing the real estate search experience using machine learning.
PRIVACY.USAGE_ITEM2: Facilitating communication between buyers and real estate agents.
PRIVACY.USAGE_ITEM3: Sending personalized alerts about new properties that match your interests.
PRIVACY.PROTECTION_TEXT: We use advanced encryption protocols (SSL) to protect data transmission and store images and profiles via trusted global cloud services to ensure the highest security levels.

ABOUT.HERO_DESC: baytology is not just a real estate platform — it's a tech revolution aimed at simplifying the search for your ideal home using the most powerful AI tools.
ABOUT.VISION_TEXT: To become the first and only platform that comes to mind for property seekers in the Middle East, by offering a clutter-free user experience, rich in precision, and powered by extraordinary human and technical intelligence.
ABOUT.PILLAR_SPEED_DESC: Find what you're looking for in seconds.
ABOUT.PILLAR_TRUST_DESC: Verified agents and carefully inspected properties.
ABOUT.PILLAR_SMART_DESC: Algorithms that understand your needs beyond imagination.
ABOUT.CTA_TITLE: Are you ready to start your journey?

FAQ.DESCRIPTION: Everything you need to know about using Baytology
FAQ.HELP_DESC: Our support team is always available to answer your complex queries and provide technical assistance.

BUYER.Q1: How does the AI recommendation engine work?
BUYER.A1: Our system uses advanced algorithms to analyze your browsing history, properties you spent more time viewing, and your geographic and material preferences to deliver an accurate list of properties matching your personal taste.
BUYER.A2: Yes, the platform provides a built-in instant chat system that lets you communicate directly with agents, share images, and exchange property links to discuss details before any booking.
BUYER.Q3: How are property tour bookings confirmed?
BUYER.A3: Once you select a tour time, the agent receives an instant notification. Upon accepting, you'll get a confirmation message and a reminder on your phone before the appointment.
BUYER.A4: It allows you to search using natural language — e.g., "I want a spacious apartment in Cairo with Nile view at a fair price" — and the search engine will understand your requirements precisely and show matching results.
BUYER.Q5: How can I save properties to view them later?
BUYER.A5: You can save any property you like by clicking the "Save Property" button on the property details page. It will be immediately added to the "Favorites" list in your profile for easy access anytime.

AGENT.Q1: How do I list a new property on Baytology?
AGENT.A1: You can easily add a property by clicking the "Add Property" button in the top navigation. Fill in basic details such as title, price, area, and amenities, then upload high-quality images and pin the property's location on the interactive map.
AGENT.Q2: How do I receive and accept property tour bookings?
AGENT.A2: When a buyer books a viewing for one of your properties, you'll get an instant notification in the app and an email alert. Navigate to the "Bookings" page to review the request, approve it, or propose a reschedule.
AGENT.Q3: Can I share multiple listings with a client in chat?
AGENT.A3: Absolutely. Our upgraded chat system includes a "Share Properties" tool directly within the chat window. You can search, select the relevant listings, and share them instantly as elegant interactive cards with your client.
AGENT.Q4: How does the platform verify my agent account?
AGENT.A4: Once you complete your profile and upload your real estate license credentials, our admin team reviews the documents. Upon successful validation, you will be granted a green "Verified Agent" badge to boost client trust.
AGENT.Q5: What is the commission policy for listings?
AGENT.A5: Listing properties on Baytology is completely free for agents. A nominal transaction commission is only applied upon successful sale or lease agreements finalized through the platform's escrow system, depending on your subscription tier.

ADMIN.Q1: How do I verify a new real estate agent?
ADMIN.A1: Navigate to the Admin Panel, select the "Agents" tab, and you will see a list of pending verification requests. You can examine their uploaded licensing documents and click "Verify Agent" to officially activate their verified status and grant the badge.
ADMIN.Q2: How can I audit AI search queries and system logs?
ADMIN.A2: The Admin Panel contains dedicated sections for AI Monitoring and System Audit Logs. You can inspect technical details, query-response correlations, execution times, outbox sync events, and review technical logs to troubleshoot system issues.
ADMIN.Q3: How do I process payment refund requests?
ADMIN.A3: When a booking is canceled, the request appears in the "Refunds" section of the Admin Panel. You can inspect the cancellation reasons, original payment references, and approve the refund to trigger the refund transaction through the payment gateway.
ADMIN.A4: It is an administrative tool to monitor the performance of our recommendation engine. It displays key metrics such as matching accuracy rates, predictive analytics precision, outbox synchronization events, and recommendation click-through rates.
ADMIN.Q5: How can I monitor system performance and health?
ADMIN.A5: The Admin Panel displays live System Health indicators, network latency stats, active SignalR chat connections, memory consumption trends, and Cloudinary media storage usage to ensure the system is running optimally.
